# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 10
addi t1, zero, 20
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 30

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1
addi t1, zero, 1
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 7
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 12

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 10
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 15

# 5 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li t1, 1
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x8000000000000000

# 6 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 7 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, zero, -5
# Result: t1 = -5

# 8 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a0, a0, 2047
# Result: a0 = 0x7fe

# 9 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 10 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
addi a1, a0, 0
# Result: a1 = 0x12345678

# 11 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,1
slli t0, t0, 32
addiw t1, t0, -1
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 12 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi ra, zero, -1
addiw sp, ra, 0
# Result: sp = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 13 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addiw t0, zero, -1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 14 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7fffffff
addiw a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 15 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x7fffffff
addiw t1, t0, 1
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 16 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -0x7fffffff
addiw a1, a0, 0
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 17 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1
addi t1, zero, 1
addw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 18 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x7ffff
addi a0, a0, -1
addi a1, zero, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7ffff000

# 19 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -2
li t1, 1
addw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 20 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80000000
li t1, 0x1
li t2, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
addw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 21 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xfffffffffff0000
li t1, 0x12345678abcdef00
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x2345678abcd0000

# 22 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0xf
addi a1, zero, 0x3
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x3

# 23 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 15
addi t1, zero, 240
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 24 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x123456789abcdef0
li a1, 0x0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x20406080a0c0e00

# 25 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
li t1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

# 26 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1
addi t1, zero, -1
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 27 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xffffffffffffffff
li t1, 0x0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xf0f0f0f0f0f0f0f

# 28 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
andn t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xf000f000f000f000

# 29 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
andi t1, t0, 0x7ff
# Result: t1 = 0x7ff

# 30 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0xff00f
addi t0, t0, 0xff
andi t1, t0, -1
# Result: t1 = 0xff00f0ff

# 31 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
andi a1, a0, -2048
# Result: a1 = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 32 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
andi a1, a0, 255
# Result: a1 = 255

# 33 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, zero, -1
andi t0, t1, 0x7ff
# Result: t0 = 2047

# 34 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori a1, zero, 0x123
andi a2, a1, 0xff
# Result: a2 = 0x23

# 35 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x1
addi a0, a0, 0x234
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0x34

# 36 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x923451e6

# 37 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x123
# Result: a0 = 0x801231e6

# 38 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0xfffff
# Result: a0 = 0x7ffff1e6

# 39 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x7ffff
# Result: a0 = 0xfffff1e6

# 40 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x923451e6

# 41 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
jalr zero, 48(t0)
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
addi zero, zero, 0
li a0, 0xdeadbeef
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 42 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
lw t1, 4(t0)
nop
# Result: t1 = 0x13

# 43 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0
# Result: a0 = 0x800001e6

# 44 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi t1, zero, 42
c.add t0, t1
# Result: t0 = 42

# 45 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 3
c.add t0, t1
# Result: t0 = 8

# 46 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.nop
addi a0, zero, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 47 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 5
c.addi a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 5

# 48 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addi a0, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 49 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addi ra, 5
# Result: ra = 5

# 50 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addiw t0, -1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 51 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x1234567880000001
c.sext.w a0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 52 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x80000001 # load a value with bit31 = 1
mv a1, a0 # preserve original value for later use
c.sext.w a0 # sign‑extend word in a0
mv a2, a1 # restore original value into a2
c.addiw a2, 0 # sign‑extend word in a2 using C.ADDIW rd,0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 53 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 7
c.addw a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 12

# 54 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li s1, 0x7fffffff
li a0, 1
c.addw s1, a0
# Result: s1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 55 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li t0, 0x7fffffff
li t1, 1
addw t0, t0, t1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 56 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
li a0, 0xFF
li a1, 0x0F
c.and a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x0F

# 57 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
li a1, 0x0FF00FF00FF00FF0
c.and a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x00F000F000F000F0

# 58 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
li t0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
mv s0, t0
mv s1, t1
c.and s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0x0f000f000f000f00

# 59 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFF00FF00
c.andi a0, 0xF
# Result: a0 = 0

# 60 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 15
c.andi a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 3

# 61 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li t0, 0xf0f0f0f0
li t1, 0x0f0f0f0f
or t0, t0, t1
ebreak
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffff

# 62 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 3
c.or a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x7

# 63 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
li a1, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
c.or a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 64 # Extension Must Be Active: C
c.addi a0, 5
c.slli a0, 2
# Result: a0 = 20

# 65 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
addi s0, zero, 5
c.slli s0, 2
# Result: s0 = 20

# 66 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
addi a0, zero, -8
c.srai a0, 2
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 67 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x0000FF00
c.srli a0, 8
# Result: a0 = 0xFF

# 68 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, -1
c.srli a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# 69 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
li a0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
c.srli a0, 4
# Result: a0 = 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F

# 70 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, zero, 0x123
addi a1, zero, 0x456
c.xor a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x575

# 71 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi s0, zero, 0xf
addi s1, zero, 0xf0
c.xor s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0xff

# 72 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li t0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
add s0, t0, zero
xor s0, s0, t1
ebreak
# Result: s0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 73 # Extension Must Be Active: Zca
li s0, 0x12345678
li s1, 0xdeadbeef
c.xor s0, s1
# Result: s0 = 0xcc99e897

# 74 # Extension Must Be Active: Zcb
li a0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
li a1, 0x1234567890abcdef
c.xor a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0xcc99e8974e067300

# 75 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 10
li a1, -3
div a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -3

# 76 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 20
addi t1, zero, 3
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
mul t4, t2, t1
add t4, t4, t3
sub t5, t4, t0
# Result: t5 = 0

# 77 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 5
div t1, t0, zero
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 78 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
li t1, -1
div t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x8000000000000000

# 79 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xffffffffffffffff
li a1, 2
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

# 80 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
divu a0, a0, zero
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 81 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, -1
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 82 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, -1
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 83 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 2
divuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7fffffff

# 84 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 20
addi a1, zero, 3
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 6 & a3 = 2

# 85 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x5555555555555555

# 86 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 10
divu a2, a0, zero
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: t2 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

# 90 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

divu t0, a0, a1
remu t1, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 3 & t1 = 1

# 91 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi a1, zero, 0
divu a2, a0, a1
or a3, a2, zero
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 92 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 1000
addi a1, zero, 30
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
# Result: a0 = 1000

# 93 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 10
addi t1, zero, 3
divuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 3

# 94 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 2

# Result: a2 = 0x40000000

# 95 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 96 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a2, 2

# Result: a0 = 0x3ff

li a2, 3

# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# 99 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 2
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -3

# 100 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 12345
li a1, 67
divw a2, a0, a1
remw a3, a0, a1
mulw a4, a1, a2
addw a5, a4, a3
# Result: a5 = 12345

# 101 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
add a0, zero, zero
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 102 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80000001
li t1, -1
divw t2, t0, t1
add a0, t2, zero
# Result: a0 = 0x7fffffff

# 103 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000000
li a1, -1
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 104 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, 2
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 105 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x12345
# Result: a0 = 0x12345000

# 106 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x12345
# Result: a0 = 0x12345000

# 107 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0x80000
# Result: t0 = 0x80000000

# 108 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 35

# 109 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 35

# 110 # Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
addi a0, zero, 3
addi a1, zero, 4
li t0, 0x1000 # mask with M bit (bit 12) set
csrrc zero, misa, t0 # clear M bit in misa
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 12

# 111 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 1
csrr t0, misa
li t1, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFEFFF
and t0, t0, t1
csrw misa, t0
mul a1, a2, a3
li a0, 2
# Result: a0 = 1

# 112 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 35

# 113 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x00000000FFFFFFFE
li t1, -1
mul t2, t0, t1
srai t3, t2, 32
# Result: t3 != 0

# 114 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
li a1, 0x9abcdef0
slli a2, a0, 32
slli a3, a1, 32
mulh a4, a2, a3
# Result: a4 = -518877309115228032

# 115 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x100000000
li t1, 0x100000000
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# 116 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 3
addi t1, zero, 4
addi t2, zero, 2
mulh s0, t0, t1
mul s1, s0, t2
# Result: s1 = 0

# 117 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xffffffffffffffff
li t1, 0x2
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff & t3 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 118 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -2
addi t1, zero, 3
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 119 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, 2
mulh a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 120 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi t0, zero, -1 # t0 = -1 (0xffffffffffffffff)
addi t1, zero, 2 # t1 = 2
mulh t2, t0, t1 # t2 = high 64 bits of signed multiply (-1 * 2)
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 121 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, 2
mulh t0, a0, a1
mul t1, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF & t1 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFE

# 122 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 2
li a1, 3
mulh a2, a0, a1
mul a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0 & a3 = 6

# 123 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
li t1, 1
mulh t0, t0, t1
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 124 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, zero, -2
addi a2, zero, 3
mulhsu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 125 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhsu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 126 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhsu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -1

# 127 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x100000000
li t1, 0x100000000
mulhsu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x1

# 128 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhsu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 129 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, 2
mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 130 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
addi a1, zero, -1
mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 131 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhu a2, a0, a1
mul a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1 & a3 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 132 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 2
li t1, 3
mul t3, t0, t1
mulhu t2, t0, t1
or a0, t2, zero
# Result: a0 = 0

# 133 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
li t1, 2
mulhu t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# 134 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xffffffff
li a1, 2
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 135 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 12345678
li a1, 9
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 111111102

# 136 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1 # rs1 = 0xffff_ffff_ffff_ffff (-1)
addi t1, zero, 2 # rs2 = 2
mulw t2, t0, t1 # rd = sign‑extended 32‑bit product
# Result: t2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 137 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -2
addi a1, zero, 2
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffc

# 138 # Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 7
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 35

# 139 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0xaa
addi a1, zero, 0x55
or a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xff

# 140 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 10
or a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xf

# 141 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0
addi t0, t0, 0xf
lui t1, 0
addi t1, t1, 0xf0
or t2,t0,t1
# Result: t2 = 0xff

# 142 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1 # a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff
addi a1, zero, 1 # a1 = 0x1
or a2, a0, a1 # a2 = a0 OR a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 143 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 0xf0
addi t1, zero, 0xf
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xff

# 144 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li s1, 0xF0F0
li s2, 0x0FF0
czero.nez t0, zero, zero
or t2, s1, s2
# Result: t2 = 0xfff0

# 145 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, zero, 5
addi t2, zero, 3
addi t3, zero, 1
or t0, t1, t2
czero.eqz t0, zero, t3
# Result: t0 = 0x7

# 146 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 0x123
ori t1, t0, 0x7ff
# Result: t1 = 0x7ff

# 147 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori a0, zero, 0xff
ori a1, a0, -1
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 148 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori a0, zero, 1

ori a1, a0, 0x7ff
# Result: a1 = 0x80000000000007ff

# 149 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -13
li t1, 5
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = -3

# 150 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, zero, -10
addi a2, zero, 3
rem a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 151 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 42
rem a2, a0, zero
# Result: a2 = 42

# 152 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, -1
rem a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 153 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, -1
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x8000000000000000

# 154 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x80000 # a0 = 0x80000000
addi a0, a0, 1 # a0 = 0x80000001 (lower 32‑bit pattern with sign‑bit set)
addi a1, zero, 0 # a1 = 0 (divisor = 0)
remuw a2, a0, a1 # a2 = sign‑extended remainder = 0xffffffff80000001
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 155 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 1000000
li t1, 12345
rem t2, t0, t1
div t3, t0, t1
mul t4, t3, t1
add t5, t4, t2
sub a0, t5, t0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 156 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 10
li a1, 3
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# 157 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, 3
remuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 158 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 159 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

remu a2, a0, a1 # a2 = a0 % a1 = 1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: a1 = 0x12345678abcdef0

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: t2 = 0xff

# 279 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t2 = 0xff

# 280 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t2 = 0x92345000

# 281 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
not a0, a0
ebreak
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 282 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicond
li a0, 1                                    # condition (non‑zero)
li a1, 0x12345678ABCDEF01
li a2, 0xFEDCBA9876543210
xor a3, a1, a2                               # expected XOR result
xor a5, a1, a2                               # compute XOR into temporary
snez a6, a0                                   # a6 = (a0 != 0) ? 1 : 0
sub a6, zero, a6                               # a6 = -a6 => 0 or all‑ones
and a6, a5, a6                               # mask the XOR result
or  a4, a6, zero                               # conditional XOR result in a4
ebreak                                        # terminate execution
# Result: a4 = 0xECE8ECE0DD99DD11

# 283 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x0F0F0F0F
li t1, 0x33333333
vsetvli t2, zero, e32,m1
vmv.v.x v1, t0
vmv.v.x v2, t1
vxor.vv v3, v2, v1
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0x3c3c3c3c

# 284 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
li t1, 0x00FF00FF00FF00FF
vsetvli zero, zero, e64,m1
vmv.v.x v2, t0
vxor.vx v3, v2, t1
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0x0FF00FF00FF00FF0

# 285 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x12345678abcdef00
li t0, 1
vsetvli t1, t0, e64,m1
vmv.v.x v2, a1
vxor.vi v0, v2, 0xF
vmv.x.s a0, v0
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678abcdef0f

# 286 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 3
vsetvli t0, a0, e64,m1
li t1, 0xAA
vmv.v.x v2, t1
li t2, 0x0
vmv.v.x v1, t2
# create an all‑true mask in v0
vmv.v.x v0, t2          # v0 = 0 vector
li t3, -1
vmsltu.vx v0, v0, t3    # v0 = mask of all ones
vredxor.vs v3, v2, v1, v0.t
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0xAA

# 287 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t2,0x80002000
li tp,0xdeadbeef
sw tp,0(t2)
li t1,0x12345678
amoxor.w t0,t1,(t2)
lw s0,0(t2)
# Result: t0 = 0xdeadbeef & s0 = 0xcc99e897

# 288 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, zero, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 289 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 2047
xori t1, t0, -1
# Result: t1 = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 290 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, zero, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 291 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
xori a1, a0, -1
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffedcba987

# 292 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 0x123
xori t1, t0, -1
not t2, t0
# Result: t1 = -292

# 293 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li s1, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
xori s1, s1, -1
# Result: s1 = 0xedcba9876543210f

# 294 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkr
csrw mseccfg, zero
csrr a0, mseccfg
andi a0, a0, 0x1
# Result: a0 = 0
